title: Sunrise Manor Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sunrise Manor, with a Z-Score of +6.43. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Sunrise Manor is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 21.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 6%, exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 9.7 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
